_comment: Loci MCP server reference config. Surfaced via the landing LLMAGE one-liner (`git clone … && cd loci/desktop && cat .mcp.json`). Apache 2.0.
_status: open beta — moves with the desktop app release cadence

loci._note: Provided by the Loci Desktop app (https://github.com/huximaxi/loci/releases). Until 1B-goose-mcp lands, this entry is a config target — the Loci Desktop app exposes the MCP server when running.

_resources: https://loci.garden/install/wizard.sh — installer that merges this into your Claude Desktop config
